trigger.description: A legacy or manually edited handoff capsule has no top-level integrity block, so resume fails closed unless the caller explicitly opts into the insecure audited bypass.
setup_commands:
python3 - <<'PY'
import json
p='capsule.json'
d=json.load(open(p))
d.pop('integrity', None)
open(p,'w').write(json.dumps(d, indent=2))
PY

expected_emission.repair_string: Recreate the capsule with this ee version, or pass --insecure-skip-hmac for audited emergency recovery.
